title: CI Zero-Bypass Verification Report
summary: Trigger active; bypass insert attempted via direct SQL returns LEGACY_PIPELINE_DISABLED. All 46 ready rows carry CI stamps. Publishing remains LOCKED.

checks.name: trigger_exists
checks.detail: pg_trigger 'pcie2_publish_queue_ci_gate' present BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE.

checks.name: bypass_rejected

checks.name: ready_rows_stamped
checks.detail: 46/46 ready rows carry ci_version + 5 fingerprints (avg ci_score 95).

checks.name: assembler_stamps

checks.name: safety_locks
